## Summary

What feature are you proposing?

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Design

How would you implement this? Which services would be affected?

## Constitution / Policy Check

Does this feature require changes to:
- [ ] PantheonConstitution.sol (requires ZeusMultisig approval)
- [ ] Risk policy (requires ZeusMultisig approval)
- [ ] Agent prompts (requires ZeusMultisig approval for major changes)
- [ ] Moirai laws

## Affected Services

- [ ] Apollo
- [ ] Areopagus
- [ ] Boule / agent prompts
- [ ] Contracts
- [ ] Elysium
- [ ] Moirai
- [ ] Olympus
- [ ] Ostrakon
- [ ] Parthenon / ERC-8004
- [ ] Pythia
- [ ] Strategos
- [ ] Underworld
- [ ] Web UI

## Acceptance Criteria

How do we know this is done?
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] On-chain changes deployed (if applicable)
